name: Graham Cracker Crust
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Southern Living
Preparation Time: 0:05
Melt butter or margarine. Combine all ingredients, mixing well. Firmly press crumb mixture evenly over bottom and sides of a 9-inch pieplate. For frozen pies, crust may be used without baking. For other pies, bake at 350°F for 7 to 9 minutes. Yield: one 9-inch crust.
